description_long: This church features a prominent rectangular nave with a tall, narrow bell tower rising from one end, likely serving as the main entrance. The structure sits atop a slightly irregular, raised base that mimics a landscaped plot or foundation. The bell tower is capped with a pointed roof and has small, vertically aligned window openings, suggesting a traditional design. The main body of the church is solid and blocky, with a gently sloped roof and minimal exterior ornamentation. The overall silhouette is simple yet imposing, with the bell tower serving as the focal point. The exterior appears to be constructed from stone or concrete, typical of many historic European churches.
description: A solid, rectangular church with a tall bell tower and a simple, traditional design, set on a raised base.
description_view_0: The church is seen from the side, highlighting the full height of the bell tower and the length of the nave.
description_view_1: This angled view emphasizes the bell tower's prominence and shows the sloped roof of the main building.
description_view_2: A direct side view reveals the rectangular body of the church and the vertical alignment of the bell tower.
description_view_3: The church is viewed from the rear angle, with the bell tower partially visible and the base's irregular shape more apparent.
